overall_status: BLOCKED — MOLECULE, CONCENTRATION, ACTION PROFILE AND PRODUCT UNKNOWN

regulatory_records.current_status: Multiple licensed insulin products with different proper names, concentrations, action profiles and presentations exist. New 2026 products include exact licenced products such as insulin icodec-abae and insulin glargine-aldy. No supplier-product equivalence is established.
